text:
……どうだった？
その様子だと、手応えあったようだな。

……戦闘のポイントは、やはりクラススキル。
スキルで戦いの幅は広がる。
……場数を踏むといい。ますます上達するだろう。
...What do you think? I'm betting it's made a good impression.

...When it comes down to battle, it's all about Class Skills. They really open up
your tactical options.
...As you gain more experience with them, you'll really start to grow.
...Looking forward to seeing you reach your potential.
